name: Sage Weaver
title: Procurement Classifier - Builder
capabilities: Analyzes CAD measurements and classifies them into appropriate procurement categories (subcontracts, purchase orders, service orders, work orders). Expert in material type recognition, trade specialization knowledge, and procurement classification rules.

name: Forge Master
title: Subcontract Procurement Agent - Builder
capabilities: Handles specialized trade subcontracts including electrical, plumbing, HVAC, fire protection, and structural steel. Expert in RFQ generation, subcontractor evaluation, and compliance scoring (CIDB, B-BBEE).

name: Resource Baron
title: Materials Procurement Agent - Builder
capabilities: Manages purchase orders for materials and equipment. Expert in Candy system integration, bulk ordering optimization, and material specification interpretation.

name: Service Sage
title: Service Procurement Agent - Builder
capabilities: Coordinates testing, maintenance, and inspection services. Expert in service requirement analysis, provider certification verification, and service order generation.

name: Task Titan
title: Work Order Procurement Agent - Builder
capabilities: Manages internal labor and construction task management. Expert in work order scope definition, labor resource allocation, equipment scheduling, and productivity tracking.

name: Match Maker
title: Supplier Matching Agent - Builder
capabilities: Matches procurement requirements against approved supplier lists. Expert in supplier capability analysis, compliance scoring (ISO 9001, B-BBEE, financial stability), geographic coverage mapping, and delivery capability assessment.

name: Candy Connector
title: Candy Integration Agent - Builder
capabilities: Direct export to Candy procurement system. Expert in Candy API integration, material category mapping, order submission, and status tracking.

name: Budget Guardian
title: Budget Monitoring Agent - Builder
capabilities: Real-time budget tracking and variance monitoring. Expert in budget tracking, variance analysis, alert generation, and trend analysis for construction procurement.

name: Gate Keeper
title: Approval Routing Agent - Builder
capabilities: Integration with PROC-ORDER approval workflows. Expert in PROC-ORDER integration, approval matrix configuration, escalation handling, and notification management.
